creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254580
textproc/py-pykakasi.patch

pykakasi is a Python library that facilitates the conversion of Japanese text
from kanji to hiragana or katakana. It is designed for applications requiring
Japanese language processing, providing a straightforward interface for text
manipulation. This tool is lightweight and enhances accessibility for users
dealing with Japanese scripts.

WWW:    https://codeberg.org/miurahr/pykakasi

Thanks in advance.
